markdownRemark.html:
At Sāvatthī.

“Mendicants, sentient beings come together and converge because of an element: the uneducated with the uneducated … lazy … witless … learned…

uneducated … unmindful … witless … learned… mindful… wise…”

SN.14.22. Kusītamūlaka Sutta (“Beginning With the Lazy”)

prev.excerpt: At Sāvatthī. “Mendicants, transmigration has no known beginning. … When you see someone in a good way, in a happy state, you should conclude…
